_notes: Copy this file to updates/YYYY-MM-DD.json and fill it in.
Remove this _notes key before running the script.
All casualty/displacement figures are CUMULATIVE (never decrease).
news[].cat: military | aviation | maritime | diplomatic | stocks | humanitarian | general
hz_events[].type: mine | cleared | patrol | passage | houthi
milestones[]: only for major turning points — leave empty [] if nothing qualifies
headline: Short headline — lead story of the day
sub: Full sub-headline with key events, prices, and figures. Include: major strikes, diplomatic moves, Brent price, gold price, casualty totals.

news.tx: Body text with more detail — 2-4 sentences. Include specific figures, locations, named officials where possible.
news.s: Source Name (Reuters, AP, Al Jazeera, etc.)

posture_updates.Iran: One paragraph max describing Iran's current military/political posture as of this date.
